violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (food processor) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed item in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: - Food storage containers (old stickers/labels), - AC vent in storage area, - Window ledge in storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The following areas are in poor repair. - ceiling tile missing (near food prep sink), - ceiling tile damage (above walk-in cooler), - wall corner (FRP coming off wall between food prep and cook line areas), - light bulbs out (under hood vents and in mop sink room). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the food prep area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
